subject: Re: Facilities area
body:
please sketch I don't understand.. vegetated roofs don't work.. forget it.


----- Original Message ----
From: "Jpm6929@aol.com" <Jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, March 23, 2007 4:14:57 PM
Subject: Facilities area


Hi Jeffrey, hope you have a nice flight.
Vin explained to me the position of the warehouse, I think it makes sense, according also to Ch. Miller.J.P.






AOL now offers free email to everyone. Find out more about what's free from AOL at AOL.com. 
Dear JP,
The existing facilities area facing the shore is at 12’while the back facing the dock and supply area is at 36’.  For this area I believe it’s very easy to have a new building with a vegetated roof, in order to hide it, with an interior clearance of 26’.
Please let me know if you need further info.
Thanks
Vin
